description: ADD COLUMN "last_seen_at" with non-constant DEFAULT: causes table rewrite under ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock. Column is also NOT NULL, requiring an additional constraint step
CREATE INDEX "idx_users_last_seen_at" without CONCURRENTLY: acquires SHARE lock, blocking all writes on "users"

Missing SET lock_timeout: without this, an ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock will queue behind running queries and every new query queues behind it, causing a lock queue death spiral Fix: Add SET lock_timeout = '2s'; at the start of the migration
Missing SET statement_timeout: long-running operations can block other queries indefinitely Fix: Add SET statement_timeout = '5min'; at the start of the migration
Missing SET application_name: makes it harder to identify migration locks in pg_stat_activity Fix: Add SET application_name = 'migrate:<migration_name>';
Missing SET idle_in_transaction_session_timeout: orphaned connections with open transactions can hold locks indefinitely Fix: Add SET idle_in_transaction_session_timeout = '30s';
Analyzed 2 SQL statements. 0 dynamic statements not analyzable. Coverage: 100%.
